prompt: A high-quality, photorealistic portrait of a handsome young Middle Eastern man with striking light-colored eyes and a sharply groomed beard. He is wearing a casual brown and beige striped thobe with gold trim at the neckline, and a traditional patterned shemagh wrapped tightly as a turban with a black band. He is looking directly at the camera with a confident expression, holding sunglasses in his hand. Clean, modern architectural background with soft natural lighting, cinematic depth of field, sharp focus. keep original face and hairstyle 100% reference Ratio 9:16
promptEn: A high-quality, photorealistic portrait of a handsome young Middle Eastern man with striking light-colored eyes and a sharply groomed beard. promptZh: 一张高质量、照片级真实感的肖像，主角为 一位英俊的年轻中东男子，拥有迷人的浅色眼睛和修剪整齐的胡须。他身穿 一件休闲的棕米色条纹长袍，领口带有金色镶边，头上紧紧缠绕着带有传统图案的头巾，并配有黑色头箍。他正自信地直视镜头，手中拿着一副太阳镜。简洁的现代建筑背景，柔和的自然光，电影级景深，焦点清晰。保持原始面部和发型 100% 参考，比例 9:16
